title: Item Interaction Disabler
description: Give you the possibility to disable right-click item interactions with blocks, items or entities!
body:
Gives you the possibility to amplify the overall customization for your modpack.
By adding your custom item IDs (such as minecraft:stick, minecraft:egg, minecraft:apple, etc.) to the config file, you can disable various item actions, placements, and interactions with entities.

 
**Feel free to use the mod in your modpack!**
